stepText: Buy 2300 sand (the goal is to get to level 70 crafting, each sand is approximately 88.1 xp) from the grinder (buy bucket packs as needed, e.g. at Alice’s farming shop near the ectofuntus). Superglass Make them into glass (18:3 no pickup). Blow all the glass into unpowered orbs doing artefacts, i.e. doing arteglass, to get to level 70 crafting. Do Pyramid Plunder for one (or two, it is recommended to get the second at/after level 91 thieving) sceptre(s) using the sceptre + xp method - all chests, sarcs in level 51+ rooms, urns in the level 81 room optional. Collect gold artefacts along the way - just bank them when your inv fills up, you’ll only need ~200 or so later.
